name: The Three-Body Problem
overview: A science-fiction drama adapted from the novel of the same name by the famous science fiction writer Liu Cixin. “Three-Body Problem” tells the story of nanomaterials scientist Wang Miao and criminal police Shi Qiang who jointly unveiled the mystery of the “Three-Body Problem” world of an extraterrestrial civilization..

trailers.title: 【2022-2023国创动画作品】定档12月3日开播！《三体》【加入会员专享最新集】
